description: For over a decade, Current Swell have earned a global following thanks to their electrifying performances and soulful songwriting. The Victoria, BC six-piece band – led by Scott Stanton and David Lang, alongside Louis Sadava, Marcus Manhas, Phil Hamelin, and Dave St. Jean – have toured the globe, captivating audiences with their infectious melodies, and a blend of indie rock, folk, and a touch of West Coast roots. After an extended break since 2019’s album, Buffalo, Current Swell returns with their highly anticipated EP, Peacekeeper; a release that reminds the world why they’ve become such a beloved force.
title: Current Swell Concert
